idea-plugin.name: Sql Generator
idea-plugin.description:
idea Sql Generator plugin


  • Easy Sql Generator
  • How to use, github: https://github.com/yseasony/idea-sql-generator-tool
  • issues: issues
  • donate: paypal
idea-plugin.change-notes:
idea Sql Generator plugin


  • Sql Generator v2.3.0
    - Compatible with new IDE versions (2024.2+ ~ 2026.x), fully passes JetBrains Marketplace verification
    - Fix all deprecated and scheduled-for-removal API usages
    - Fix plugin configuration defects (plugin dependencies, action group registration)
    - Settings page moved to Settings | Tools | SqlGenerator
    - Plugin can now be installed and updated without IDE restart
    - Build system migrated to IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.x
    - Note: this version requires IDE 2024.2 or newer; older IDEs keep v2.2.1
  • Sql Generator v2.2.1
    Support INSERT INTO ... ON DUPLICATE KEY
  • Sql Generator v2.2.0
    Support Auto SQL formatter
  • Sql Generator v2.1.2
    Support DataGrip version number
  • Sql Generator v2.0.1
    fix "com.intellij.database" not installed, support DataGrip
  • Sql Generator v2.0
    Support after idea 15.
  • Sql Generator v1.2
    Support Community Edition.
  • Sql Generator v1.1
    Support PhpStorm,PyCharm.
    Thank for juntalis fix issue.
  • Sql Generator v1.0
